idea-plugin.name: Delivery Pipeline
idea-plugin.description:
Google Cloud Deploy delivery pipelines as a service type in the Services tool window. Watch pipelines from any GCP project and region, and check every target's latest rollout state at a glance.
  • Add via the Services view's + popup: GCP Delivery Pipelines…
  • Pipeline nodes expand into targets with per-target release and rollout status (succeeded / in progress / pending approval / failed).
  • Double-click opens the pipeline in the Cloud Console; Delete unwatches it; the list persists per project.
  • Auth comes from the local gcloud CLI (one print-access-token call per ~50 min); data is fetched directly from the Cloud Deploy REST API.
Requires the gcloud CLI, authenticated (gcloud auth login).

action.description: Watch Google Cloud Deploy delivery pipelines in the Services tool window
